title: Better Connected Glass
description: A resource pack that gives glass blocks smooth, connected textures for a cleaner, more immersive building experience.
body:
...![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/292205a1fa1fe8b0f5b855f062a1eb791d1f8b3a.png) 

![tinted_glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b736de5d65bd741cbcc04bea59c0d85bb611b43a_0.webp)

Better Connected Glass improves the visual experience of Minecraft by adding seamless connected textures to all types of glass blocks and panes. This resource pack is perfect for builders who want clean lines, uninterrupted transparency, and a modern aesthetic in their builds.

🌟 Features:
Connected glass textures for clear, tinted, and stained glass blocks and panes

Clean, borderless visuals that blend beautifully with any build style

Compatible with Sodium + Indium + Continuity

Designed for both survival and creative building
